input: I returned the upgrade but the refund hasn't shown on my statement.
Why am I paying a processing fee on top of the subscription price?
Can you move my payment due date to the 15th of each month?
The invoice lists a seat count higher than what we actually use.
I need a consolidated bill covering all three of our workspaces.
My prepaid credits were charged twice for a single purchase.
Please end the auto-renew so I'm not billed for another year.
The exchange rate on my charge differs from what was quoted.
I want to apply the loyalty discount that wasn't on this invoice.
Refund the partial month after I cancelled mid-cycle.
Change the billing contact email to our finance department.
There's a recurring charge for an add-on I never subscribed to.
Can I prepay the next twelve months in a single invoice?
The tax rate on my bill looks wrong for my country.
I was charged the full price despite my nonprofit discount.
The notification bell shows a count but the panel is empty.
Exporting a large report times out before the download starts.
The Slack integration posts duplicate messages for one event.
Inline editing reverts my changes the moment I click away.
The login page is stuck in an infinite redirect loop.
Uploaded avatars appear rotated 90 degrees after saving.
The dashboard numbers don't match the values in the raw export.
The webhook retries forever even after we return a 200.
Keyboard shortcuts stopped responding after the latest release.
The embedded video player shows a black screen with audio only.
Filtering by tag returns items that don't have that tag.
The mobile app logs me out every time I background it.
The API docs example returns a 400 with the exact payload shown.
Tooltips render off-screen on the far-right column.
The bulk delete only removes the first page of selected rows.
How do I assign a billing-only role without giving full admin?
I need to merge two workspaces that belong to the same team.
Please remove my email from the shared contact directory.
How do I rotate the access token tied to my account?
I want to verify a new domain for my organization's logins.
Can you restore a member I accidentally removed yesterday?
How do I change the owner of a shared folder to someone else?
I need to disable login via password and require SSO only.
Please update my legal name as it appears on my profile.
How do I see the audit trail of who accessed my account?
I want to remove the connected calendar from my profile.
Can you help me recover the email tied to a dormant account?
How do I promote a guest to a full member of the team?
I need to set up a delegate who can manage my profile settings.
Please revoke the invitation I sent to the wrong address.
